meta_description: Connect your executive agent to the tools that run your business. Ask once, and get reports, schedules, follow-ups, and metrics in one conversation.
meta_og_description: Connect your executive agent to the tools that run your business. Ask once, and get reports, schedules, follow-ups, and metrics in one conversation.
meta_social_image_alt: Despacho Bonsai executive agent showing business metrics and connected tools
hero_subtitle_executive: Connect Google Calendar, HubSpot, Buffer, and Google Analytics to Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini. Then orchestrate. Schedule next week's posts, check last month's pipeline, pull a performance report — all in one conversation.
executive_pain_2_title: Your data is useful. It is also everywhere.
executive_pain_2_copy: Analytics knows what changed. HubSpot knows what stalled. Bonsai brings the scattered signals into one conversation and turns cross-tool context into reports you can act on.
executive_pain_3_title: Strategy still takes too much assembly.
executive_pain_3_copy: Creating a social strategy means pulling performance data from Analytics, pipeline signals from HubSpot, and then translating it all into posts. Bonsai connects those sources, suggests a plan, and lets you edit it until it sounds like you.
executive_hiw_subtitle: Three simple steps, each paired with a visual.
executive_hiw_step_1_copy: Pick the tools you already use and connect them with one click or tap.
executive_hiw_step_2_copy: Paste the Bonsai MCP address into Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or the assistant you use.
executive_hiw_step_3_copy: Ask Claude to get you set up. Bonsai exposes your connected tools as actions your assistant can use.
executive_guided_copy: Bonsai can recommend predefined plays through the MCP endpoint, so Claude can guide the work instead of asking you to invent the workflow from scratch.
executive_cta_title: Run the business from one conversation.
executive_cta_subtitle: Connect your tools, ask what you need, and let your executive agent pull the work together.
